message:
🌱 Add rook: ceph: support for S3 buckets as DNS subdomain style mission (#1796)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "rook-4780-ceph-support-for-s3-buckets-as-dns-subdomain-style",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "rook: ceph: support for S3 buckets as DNS subdomain style",
+    "description": "ceph: support for S3 buckets as DNS subdomain style. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current rook deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your rook version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook\nhelm list -n rook 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working rook installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review rook configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant rook configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook\nkubectl get configmap -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=rook\n```\n**Is this a bug report or feature request?**\n* Feature Request\n\n**What should the feature do:**\nCurrently only the bucket Path style is supported."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for ceph: support for S3 buckets as DNS subdomain style",
+        "description": "Another workaround suggested in Slack channel. It works in my cluster! We need to modify zonegroup in the toolbox container.\n```\n[rook]$ radosgw-admin zonegroup get > zonegroup.json\n[rook]$ vi  zonegroup.json\n...\n    \"hostnames\": [\"SERVICE_NAME.rook-ceph.svc\",\"YOUR DOMAIN FOR SUB DOMAIN STYLE\"],\n  \n```yaml\napiVersion: v1\nkind: ConfigMap\nmetadata:\n  name: rook-config-override\n  namespace: rook-ceph\ndata:\n  config: |\n    [global]\n    rgw dns name = files.example.com\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook\nkubectl get events -n rook --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"ceph: support for S3 buckets as DNS subdomain style\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Another workaround suggested in Slack channel. It works in my cluster! We need to modify zonegroup in the toolbox container.\n```\n[rook]$ radosgw-admin zonegroup get > zonegroup.json\n[rook]$ vi  zonegroup.json\n...\n    \"hostnames\": [\"SERVICE_NAME.rook-ceph.svc\",\"YOUR DOMAIN FOR SUB DOMAIN STYLE\"],\n    \"hostnames_s3website\": [\"...\"],\n...",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: v1\nkind: ConfigMap\nmetadata:\n  name: rook-config-override\n  namespace: rook-ceph\ndata:\n  config: |\n    [global]\n    rgw dns name = files.example.com",
+        "kubectl -n rook-ceph exec -it $(kubectl -n rook-ceph get pod -l \"app=rook-ceph-tools\" -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}') bash",
+        "ceph configset client.ceph.objectstore-2.a rgw_dns_name ceph-s3.domain-name.com;"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "rook",
+      "graduated",
+      "storage",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "rook"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/rook/rook/issues/4780",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/rook/rook"
+    },
+    "reactions": 7,
+    "comments": 41,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with rook installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
